name: Hot Dog Stand
description: Grabbing a dirty water dog from a classic NYC street cart.
prompt: A caricature portrait of the person in the reference photo, standing at an iconic New York City hot dog stand on a bustling Manhattan sidewalk. Yellow Sabrett umbrella, steaming pretzels and hot dogs, yellow taxi cabs blurred in the background. Exaggerated friendly caricature style, oversized head, warm colorful illustration, daytime, vibrant.
